title: Identify and record sites, objects and cultural landscapes on Country
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and record sites, objects and cultural landscapes on Country demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander sites, objects and materials and cultural landscapes on Country

pcs.text: Identify and consult appropriate local Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and consult appropriate local Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and consult appropriate local Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Obtain appropriate approval to be on Country to perform identification and recording work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain appropriate approval to be on Country to perform identification and recording work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain appropriate approval to be on Country to perform identification and recording work.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscapes and Aboriginal sites.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the interrelationship of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural materials and objects to landscapes and land management.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out identification and recording work on and off Country according to workplace health and safety policies and procedures.
